flow.responsibility: Extract text, tables, metadata from PDF
Identify layout type and column structure
Determine account type (ACTIVO/PASIVO/PERDIDA/PATRIMONIO) from column context
Normalize, clean OCR errors, expand abbreviations, tokenize
Match normalized name to Concept Catalog via RapidFuzz
Assign final CMCC code with confidence level
Catch remaining accounts with legacy regex patterns

side_components.name: Concept Catalog
side_components.description: 78 concepts, versioned JSON, single source of truth

side_components.name: Feature Flags
side_components.description: CMCCFeatureFlags — runtime control of all stages
